zh.lifeSummary: 當William Devereux Lord of Lyonshall於1219年出生在英國賀福爾利沙拉爾時，他的父親Lord Stephen Devereux of Lyonshall28歲，母親Isabel de Cantelowe25歲。他於從1239年1月8日到1240年1月7日與Matilda de Giffard在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1265年8月4日在英國武斯特斯爾艾維沙安 哥吉拉 沙智 煙雨 聖 勞倫斯享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Devereux Lord of Lyonshall于1219年出生在英国賀福爾利沙拉爾时，他的父亲Lord Stephen Devereux of Lyonshall28岁，母亲Isabel de Cantelowe25岁。他于从1239年1月8日到1240年1月7日与Matilda de Giffard在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1265年8月4日在英国武斯特斯爾艾維沙安 哥吉拉 沙智 煙雨 聖 勞倫斯享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Devereux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William Devereux Lord of Lyonshall was born in 1219, in Lyonshall, Herefordshire, England, his father, Lord Stephen Devereux of Lyonshall, was 28 and his mother, Isabel de Cantelowe, was 25. He married Matilda de Giffard from 8 January 1239 to 7 January 1240, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 4 August 1265, in Evesham All Saints with St Lawrence, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Devereux Lord of Lyonshall est né en 1219, à Lyonshall, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Stephen Devereux of Lyonshall, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Cantelowe, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Matilda de Giffard du 8 janvier 1239 au 7 janvier 1240, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 août 1265, à Evesham All Saints with St Lawrence, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Devereux Lord of Lyonshall 1219 in Lyonshall, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Stephen Devereux of Lyonshall 28 und seine Mutter Isabel de Cantelowe 25. Er hat von 8. Januar 1239 bis 7. Januar 1240 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Matilda de Giffard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. August 1265 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Evesham All Saints with St Lawrence, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Devereux Lord of Lyonshall è nato il nel 1219 nel Lyonshall, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Stephen Devereux of Lyonshall, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Cantelowe, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Matilda de Giffard da 8 gennaio 1239 a 7 gennaio 1240, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 agosto 1265, nel Evesham All Saints with St Lawrence, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Devereux Lord of Lyonshallが1219年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリオンシャルで生まれた時，父Lord Stephen Devereux of Lyonshallは28歳，母Isabel de Canteloweは25歳であった。から1239年1月8日まで1240年1月7日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでMatilda de Giffardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1265年8月4日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャム アル サインツ ウィス スト ラウレンスで46歳で死去した。

ko.Evesham All Saints with St Lawrence, Wor: 영국 워스스터실르 에베샤 앨 세인츠 위스 스트 로렌스
ko.lifeSummary: William Devereux Lord of Lyonshall(이)가 1219년 영국 허퍼드실르 리샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Stephen Devereux of Lyonshall(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Cantelowe(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1239년 1월 8일부터 1240년 1월 7일까지 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Matilda de Giffard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1265년 8월 4일 영국 워스스터실르 에베샤 앨 세인츠 위스 스트 로렌스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Matilda de Giffard de 8 de janeiro de 1239 a 7 de janeiro de 1240, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Evesham All Saints with St Lawrence, Wor: эвешам алл сеинц вит ст ларенс, ворсестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Devereux Lord of Lyonshall родился в 1219 г. в местности леншолл, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Stephen Devereux of Lyonshall было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Cantelowe, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de Giffard с 8 января 1239 по 7 января 1240 в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 августа 1265 г. в местности эвешам алл сеинц вит ст ларенс, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.
